items.docs: Lists all MAP Migration projects for the current client. Returns a JSON array containing all MAP Migration projects signed by the customer with AWS.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the MAP Migration project.

items.docs: Retrieves utilization-based recommendations for the Essentials scheduler, identifying idle or underutilized resources.

items.docs: Retrieves a summary of utilization recommendations for the Essentials scheduler.
Creates a new scheduler for automating resource management tasks such as starting and stopping non-production workloads on a schedule to reduce costs.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the scheduler to trigger.

items.docs: Manually triggers a specific scheduler to run its configured actions immediately.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the scheduler to enable.

items.docs: Enables a previously disabled scheduler so it resumes running on its configured schedule.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the scheduler to disable.

items.docs: Disables a scheduler so it stops running on its configured schedule.
